title: Am-Tech S1675 Rechargeable Mini Key Fob Light, Black
features: 3 COB LED modes half - full - flash
description: Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee.
